simple_types.name: Constant_Reference_Type
simple_types.code:
type Constant_Reference_Type (Element : not null access constant Unicode_Character) is private with
  Implicit_Dereference => Element;

simple_types.name: Encoding_Scheme
simple_types.code: type Encoding_Scheme is (ASCII_7, Latin_1, UTF_8, UTF_16BE, UTF_16LE);

documentation.description: Supported encoding schemes

simple_types.name: Reference_Type
simple_types.code:
type Reference_Type (Element : not null access Unicode_Character) is private with
  Implicit_Dereference => Element;

tagged_types.name: UXString
tagged_types.code:
type UXString is tagged private with
  Constant_Indexing => Constant_Reference, Variable_Indexing => Reference, Default_Iterator => Iterate,
  Iterator_Element  => Unicode_Character,
  Aggregate => (Empty => Empty, Add_Unnamed => Append, New_Indexed => New_String, Assign_Indexed => Replace_Element),
  String_Literal    => From_Unicode;

documentation.description: Container type of Unicode characters with dynamic size usually named string
Characters in ISO/IEC 646

subtypes.name: ASCII_Character_Array
subtypes.code:
subtype ASCII_Character_Array is String with
    Dynamic_Predicate => (for all Item of ASCII_Character_Array => Item in ASCII_Character);

documentation.description: Characters in ISO/IEC 646

Characters in Unicode Basic Multilingual Plane
(Could be also named UCS_2_Character (Universal Coded Character Set)?)

Characters in Unicode Basic Multilingual Plane
(Could be also named UCS_2_Character (Universal Coded Character Set)?)
Characters in ISO/IEC 8859-1
Characters in ISO/IEC 8859-1

Characters in Unicode planes
(Could be also named UCS_4_Character?)

Characters in Unicode planes
(Could be also named UCS_4_Character?)
Array of 8 bits values representing UTF encodings (UTF-8, UTF-16BE, or UTF-16LE)

subtypes.name: UTF_16_Encoding_Scheme
subtypes.code: subtype UTF_16_Encoding_Scheme is Encoding_Scheme range UTF_16BE .. UTF_16LE;

documentation.description: Supported UTF-16 encoding schemes
Array of 8 bits values representing UTF encodings (UTF-8, UTF-16BE, or UTF-16LE)
Represent the null string

subprograms.code: function "&" (Left : Unicode_Character; Right : UXString) return UXString

documentation.description: Return the concatenation of Left and Right

subprograms.code: function "&" (Left : UXString; Right : Unicode_Character) return UXString

documentation.description: Return the concatenation of Left and Right

subprograms.code: function "&" (Left : UXString; Right : UXString) return UXString

documentation.description: Return the concatenation of Left and Right

subprograms.code: function "*" (Left : Natural; Right : Unicode_Character) return UXString

documentation.description: Return Right character duplicated Left times

subprograms.code: function "*" (Left : Natural; Right : UXString) return UXString

documentation.description: Return Right string duplicated Left times

subprograms.code: function "<" (Left : UXString; Right : UXString) return Boolean

documentation.description: Return True if Left is less than Right

subprograms.code: function "<=" (Left : UXString; Right : UXString) return Boolean

documentation.description: Return True if Left is less or equal than Right

subprograms.code: function "=" (Left : UXString; Right : UXString) return Boolean

documentation.description: Return True if Left equals Right

subprograms.code: function ">" (Left : UXString; Right : UXString) return Boolean

documentation.description: Return True if Left is greater than Right

subprograms.code: function ">=" (Left : UXString; Right : UXString) return Boolean

documentation.description: Return True if Left greater or equal than Right

subprograms.name: Character_Set_Version
subprograms.code: function Character_Set_Version return UXString

documentation.description:
Returns an implementation-defined identifier that identifies the version of the character set standard
that is used for categorizing characters by the implementation.

subprograms.code:
function Count
  (Source : UXString; Pattern : UXString; Mapping : Wide_Wide_Character_Mapping := Identity) return Natural

subprograms.code:
function Count
  (Source : UXString; Pattern : UXString; Mapping : Wide_Wide_Character_Mapping_Function) return Natural

function Ends_With
  (Source : UXString; Pattern : UXString; Sensitivity : Case_Sensitivity := Sensitive) return Boolean

documentation.description: Return True if Source ends with pattern with respect case of sensitivity

subprograms.name: Equal_Case_Insensitive
subprograms.code: function Equal_Case_Insensitive (Left, Right : UXString) return Boolean

documentation.description:
Returns True if the strings consist of the same sequence of characters after applying locale-independent
simple case folding, as defined by documents referenced in the note in Clause 1 of ISO/IEC 10646:2011.
Otherwise, returns False.

subprograms.name: Find_Token
subprograms.code:
procedure Find_Token
  (Source : UXString; Set : Wide_Wide_Character_Set; Test : Membership; First : out Positive; Last : out Natural)

documentation.description:
Set First to position of the first character inside or outside Set matches Source
Set Last to position of the last character inside or outside Set matches Source with respect of Test membership

subprograms.name: Find_Token

documentation.description:
Set First to position of the first character inside or outside Set matches Source starting at From position
Set Last to position of the last character inside or outside Set matches Source with respect of Test membership

documentation.description: Return the position of the first character of Source (actually 1)

subprograms.name: From_UTF_16

Return an UXString from the array of UTF-16 characters parameter Source

leading BOM characters are suppressed if any

subprograms.name: Get_ASCII

function Get_ASCII
  (Source : UXString; Index : Positive; Substitute : in ASCII_Character := Q_L) return ASCII_Character

Return the ASCII character of Source at Index position,
if the character is not in ASCII set then Substitute is returned

Return the BMP character from Source at Index position,
if the character is not in BMP set then Substitute is returned

if the character is not in latin 1 set then Substitute is returned

Return the position of the first character inside or outside Set matches Source starting at From position
with respect of Test membership

  (Source : UXString; Before, After : Unicode_Character; Sensitivity : Case_Sensitivity := Sensitive)

wherever the before character is found with respect of sensitivity

subprograms.name: To_Basic
subprograms.code: function To_Basic (Item : UXString) return UXString

documentation.description:
Returns the letter corresponding to Item but with no diacritical mark,
if Item is a letter but not a basic letter; returns Item otherwise.

subprograms.code: function To_BMP (Source : UXString; Substitute : in BMP_Character := Inv_Q_B) return BMP_Character_Array

subprograms.name: To_Lower
subprograms.code: function To_Lower (Item : UXString) return UXString

subprograms.name: To_Upper

documentation.description:
Returns the corresponding upper-case value for Item if Is_Lower(Item) and Item has an upper-case form,
and returns Item otherwise.
